name: Thai Chicken & Coconut Soup Vmxv03a
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Fresh lemongrass (sliced into 1/4 inch thick pieces)
1 large Chicken breast, with skin and ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the first three ingredients to a boil in a heavy medium saucepan.
2. Reduce heat and add chicken. Simmer until almost cooked through, turning occasionally, about 12 minutes.
3. Transfer chicken to a plate and let it cool. Remove any skin and bones from the chicken.
4. Cut the meat into half-inch pieces.
5. Strain the soup through a sieve into a small saucepan.
6. Add lime juice and jalapeno to the soup. Simmer until reduced to 2 cups, about 20 minutes.
7. Add the chicken back in and simmer just to heat through.
8. Taste and adjust with more lime juice if desired.
9. Ladle the soup into bowls and sprinkle with fresh cilantro.
